title: Another coins mod
body:
![Mod logo "Another Coins Mod" "By Kitaniz"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bed6d059d1190291503c2aa140923d5bfdfa2c9.png)

# About Mod:
###  This mod adds coins made of different materials _(Copper -> Iron -> Gold -> Diamond)_

![All coins textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27d96110eceaff5d002c2eb296ab49414ead26f0.png)

### There are also coin piles

![All coin piles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8187d6f60395f37e3f9a9910ba4159869ed20108.png)

# Crafts:

### You can craft piles of coins from 9 coins of the same material for more compact storage.

![Coin pile craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f4583ee579d27effe368e69ece27837837ece50.png)

### Also, when melting coin piles, you will receive a coin of a better material.

![Other coins craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7463bdbace70514438042ce58abaa8249e69dc60.png)

### And you can also exchange expensive coins for others in the crafting table. For example, 1 iron coin = 9 copper coins.
### You can also exchange coin piles for regular coins. For example, 1 pile of coins = 9 coins.

## At the moment there is no legal way to get copper coins, so you will have to give all the coins to the players manually.

### This mod is created using mcreator!([Mcreator site](https://mcreator.net/))

My discord server: [Discord link](https://discord.com/invite/SKCbGtehye)
